Jesse Orosco

Position: Pitcher

Bats: Right  •  Throws: Left

6-2, 174lb (188cm, 78kg)

Born: April 21, 1957 in Santa Barbara, CA us

Draft: Drafted by the St. Louis Cardinals in the 7th round of the 1977 MLB January Draft-Regular Phase from Santa Barbara City College (Santa Barbara, CA) and the Minnesota Twins in the 2nd round of the 1978 MLB January Draft-Regular Phase from Santa Barbara City College (Santa Barbara, CA).

High School: Santa Barbara HS (Santa Barbara, CA)

School: Santa Barbara City College (Santa Barbara, CA)

Debut: April 5, 1979 (Age 21-349d, 14,149th in major league history)
   vs. CHC 0.1 IP, 0 H, 0 SO, 0 BB, 0 ER

Last Game: September 27, 2003 (Age 46-159d)
   vs. DET 0.2 IP, 0 H, 1 SO, 1 BB, 1 ER, L

Rookie Status: Exceeded rookie limits during 1981 season

Agents: Alan Meersand

Full Name: Jesse Russell Orosco

Pronunciation: \ore-AHS-co\

View Player Info from the B-R Bullpen

View Player Bio from the SABR BioProject

  • 2x All-Star
  • 2x World Series

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Jesse Orosco?

Jesse Orosco is 68 years old.

When was Jesse Orosco born?

Jesse Orosco was born on April 21, 1957.

Where was Jesse Orosco born?

Jesse Orosco was born in Santa Barbara, CA.

How tall is Jesse Orosco?

Jesse Orosco is 6-2 (188 cm) tall.

How much did Jesse Orosco weigh when playing?

Jesse Orosco weighed 174 lbs (78 kg) when playing.

How many seasons did Jesse Orosco play?

Jesse Orosco played 24 seasons.

Is Jesse Orosco in the Hall of Fame?

Jesse Orosco has not been elected into the Hall of Fame.

When was Jesse Orosco drafted?

Jesse Orosco was drafted by the St. Louis Cardinals in the 7th round of the 1977 MLB January Draft-Regular Phase from Santa Barbara City College (Santa Barbara, CA) and the Minnesota Twins in the 2nd round of the 1978 MLB January Draft-Regular Phase from Santa Barbara City College (Santa Barbara, CA).

What position did Jesse Orosco play?

Jesse Orosco was a Pitcher.

How many strikeouts did Jesse Orosco have?

Jesse Orosco had 1,179 strikeouts over his career.

How many teams has Jesse Orosco played for?

Jesse Orosco played for 9 teams; the Baltimore Orioles, Cleveland Indians, Los Angeles Dodgers, Milwaukee Brewers, Minnesota Twins, New York Mets, New York Yankees, San Diego Padres and St. Louis Cardinals.

How many World Series has Jesse Orosco won?

Jesse Orosco has won 2 World Series.

When did Jesse Orosco retire?

Jesse Orosco last played in 2003.
